who: IT managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 SaaS subscriptions/month
offer: For IT managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 subscriptions/month, manual tracking causes missed renewals. We automate notifications and payments instead of manual tracking.
problem: Managing multiple SaaS subscription renewals and payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for IT managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to IT managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users try subscription tracking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing subscription data
